short: Meta's AI division, best known for releasing the open-weight Llama models.
definition: Meta AI is the artificial intelligence organization at Meta, the parent of Facebook and Instagram, spanning fundamental research (FAIR) and applied products. It is best known for releasing the open-weight Llama models, which seeded a large open-source ecosystem of fine-tunes and tools. Meta AI also builds multimodal models (which handle images and audio, not just text) and code models, and ships AI features across Meta's apps.
